title: corylus avellana aurea
intro: Corylus avellana aurea, also known as the golden hazel or golden filbert, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and western Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels, improving blood circulation, and providing protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Corylus avellana aurea is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
